topic: 勇敢的小恐龙去森林探险
script:
小白兔豆豆听说森林里有会唱歌的彩虹花，拍拍胸口说：“我勇敢，我要去探险！”

他走进森林，风把树叶吹得沙沙响。豆豆有点怕，又想起妈妈说：“害怕也可以慢慢走。”他抱紧小背包，数着步子：一、二、三。

小河挡住了路。豆豆找来长树枝当拐杖，小心踩过石头。忽然“扑通！”小松鼠掉进水里，急得吱吱叫。豆豆深吸一口气，把树枝伸过去：“抓住！”松鼠爬上岸，抖抖尾巴：“你真勇敢！”

松鼠带他找到彩虹花，花朵一开，真的“啦啦啦”唱起来。豆豆笑了：“原来勇敢不是不害怕，是愿意试一试。”回家路上，他还把彩虹花的歌声装进心里，送给妈妈听。

pages.prompt:
儿童绘本封面，主题：勇敢的小恐龙去森林探险
画面比例 3:4
固定使用已保存角色资产作为视觉锚点。角色设定：小白兔豆豆：幼年小白兔（约4–6岁），体型小巧圆润，通体雪白的软毛，脸颊略带淡粉色；一对长耳朵竖起，耳尖微微向外张，内侧是浅粉色；黑亮的大眼睛，紧张时眼睛睁得更圆，开心时眉眼弯弯；小鼻头粉色，嘴巴小巧。背着一只明亮的小黄包（小尺寸、斜挎或双肩皆可表现为儿童款），背带贴合身体；整体穿着偏童趣，可搭配简洁的浅色T恤或背带短裤（不抢小黄包的视觉重点）。动作特点是爱蹦蹦跳、跑跑跳跳；情绪表情变化明显：兴奋时笑容大、眼睛发亮；被吓到时耳朵后缩、身体缩成一团、躲在树后探头；迷路时眼神慌张、心跳紧张但仍努力镇定举包自报姓名。；所有页面保持同一发型、服装和脸型。
Style: Hand-painted watercolor children's picture book illustration. Texture: Visible paper fiber, mild pigment granulation, subtle brush pressure variation, slight edge bleed, natural stroke jitter. Palette: Soft warm palette with restrained saturation and low digital gloss.
构图变化标识：第 1 幅；封面主视觉
优先真实手绘感，避免过度锐化与数字涂抹感。
Avoid AI-looking artifacts: over-smooth surfaces, plastic skin, repeated micro-patterns, duplicated objects, warped fingers, fused edges, random gibberish text, logo, watermark. Prefer natural imperfections and human-made variation: tiny asymmetry, uneven pigment density, non-uniform outlines, realistic shadow falloff.

pages.text: 【家门口/清晨】小白兔豆豆背着明亮小黄包，站在家门前拍拍胸口，眼睛发亮地说：“我勇敢，我要去探险！”背景可见森林入口与柔和晨光。
pages.prompt:
4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot, early morning outside a cozy home near forest edge. Doudou, a small chubby young white rabbit (4-6 years old), snow-white fluffy fur, slightly pink cheeks, long upright ears with pale pink inner ears, glossy black eyes. Wearing a simple light T-shirt and childlike shorts, carrying a bright small yellow backpack with snug straps. He pats his chest proudly and speaks with excitement. Soft warm sunrise, gentle breeze, shallow depth of field, natural colors, stable camera, slow push-in.

4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot at a shallow river with stepping stones. Doudou the young white rabbit stands at the bank, bright yellow backpack, thoughtful expression, pointing toward the other side as if planning. Slow semicircle orbit camera, sparkling water highlights, soft breeze, cinematic composition, 24fps film look.

pages.shotDescription: 【小河拦路】豆豆来到小河边停下，望着水面与石头，眉头微皱但不后退，抬手指向对岸像在规划路线。

pages.text: 【找树枝当拐杖】豆豆在河边捡起一根长树枝当拐杖，双手握紧试了试，点点头给自己打气。
pages.prompt:
4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, medium shot. Near riverbank, Doudou picks up a long sturdy branch, grips it with both paws like a walking stick, tests it, then nods to encourage himself. Bright yellow backpack, childlike outfit. Camera tilts up slowly from the branch to his face, soft natural light, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field.

pages.text: 【过河】豆豆用树枝撑地，小心踩过石头，一步一步移动；紧张时眼睛睁得更圆，耳朵微微后缩，但仍稳住身体。
pages.prompt:
4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot side tracking. Doudou crosses the river on stepping stones, using a long branch as support. Eyes wide with tension, ears slightly back, but posture steady. Yellow backpack stays snug. Water ripples, stones wet and reflective. Smooth lateral tracking, cinematic contrast, 35mm lens, gentle slow motion accents.

pages.text: 【突发：松鼠落水】豆豆刚踏稳一块石头，听到“扑通！”他猛地回头；画面边缘一只小松鼠掉进水里扑腾吱吱叫，豆豆表情一惊但立刻专注。
pages.prompt:
4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot. Doudou stands on a stepping stone mid-river, suddenly hears a splash; camera whip-pans to reveal a small squirrel falling into the water near him, squeaking and paddling. Doudou turns sharply, startled then focused. Stabilize after whip pan, dynamic composition, water splashes frozen crisp, 24fps cinematic, 35mm lens.

pages.shotDescription: 【突发：松鼠落水】豆豆刚踏稳一块石头，听到“扑通！”他猛地回头；画面边缘一只小松鼠掉进水里扑腾吱吱叫，豆豆表情一惊但立刻专注。

pages.text: 【救援】豆豆深吸一口气，把长树枝伸向水里的松鼠，坚定喊：“抓住！”松鼠抓住树枝，豆豆两脚站稳用力往回拉。
pages.prompt:
4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, medium shot. Doudou the young white rabbit braces himself on stones, inhales deeply, extends the long branch toward the struggling squirrel and shouts 'Grab on!'. The squirrel grips the branch; Doudou pulls with determination, eyes focused, ears slightly back. Slow push-in, dramatic but warm lighting, detailed fur and water droplets, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field.

pages.text: 【松鼠上岸致谢】松鼠被拉上岸抖抖尾巴，喘口气对豆豆说：“你真勇敢！”豆豆松一口气微笑，抱着树枝与小黄包站在一旁。
pages.prompt:
4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, medium two-shot. On riverbank, the small squirrel climbs out, shakes its tail and thanks Doudou. Doudou smiles with relief, holding the branch, bright yellow backpack visible. Gentle side slide to frame both faces, warm sunlight through leaves, 50mm lens, soft bokeh, calm tone.

pages.text: 【找到彩虹花/歌声与领悟】松鼠在前方引路（可在画面边缘指向），豆豆跟着来到彩虹花前；彩虹花绽放并“啦啦啦”唱起。豆豆眼睛弯弯笑着说：“原来勇敢不是不害怕，是愿意试一试。”
pages.prompt:
4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot. Forest clearing with a magical rainbow-colored flower. Doudou (small white rabbit with pink cheeks, upright ears, bright yellow backpack) arrives following the squirrel. The rainbow flower blooms and seems to sing 'la la la' with subtle shimmering pollen. Doudou smiles warmly and speaks his realization. Slow push from behind Doudou to reveal the flower, dreamy soft glow, volumetric light, 35mm lens, high detail.

qualityGate.summary: 发布包未通过基础质量门禁，建议补图或重跑失败页。

shots.description: 【家门口/清晨】小白兔豆豆背着明亮小黄包，站在家门前拍拍胸口，眼睛发亮地说：“我勇敢，我要去探险！”背景可见森林入口与柔和晨光。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot, early morning outside a cozy home near forest edge. Doudou, a small chubby young white rabbit (4-6 years old), snow-white fluffy fur, slightly pink cheeks, long upright ears with pale pink inner ears, glossy black eyes. Wearing a simple light T-shirt and childlike shorts, carrying a bright small yellow backpack with snug straps. He pats his chest proudly and speaks with excitement. Soft warm sunrise, gentle breeze, shallow depth of field, natural colors, stable camera, slow push-in.

shots.description: 【森林入口】豆豆蹦跳着走进森林，小黄包一晃一晃；树影变深，他回头看一眼又继续前进。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot tracking. Inside a lush forest entrance, dappled light through leaves. Doudou the young white rabbit hops forward, bright yellow backpack bouncing lightly. He glances back once then continues. Smooth side tracking, natural forest ambience, soft volumetric light rays, realistic fur detail, 35mm lens look.

shots.description: 【森林深处/风起】风吹树叶“沙沙响”。豆豆被吓到，耳朵后缩、身体缩成一团，躲在树后探头张望。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, medium shot. Deeper forest, leaves rustling in wind. Doudou, small white rabbit, ears pulled back, body curled slightly, hiding behind a tree and peeking out nervously. Bright yellow backpack visible on his back. Subtle handheld feel, slow push-in for tension, moody green tones, soft shadows, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field.

shots.description: 【回忆妈妈的话】豆豆闭眼深呼吸，抱紧小黄包，像想起妈妈一样小声自我鼓励：“害怕也可以慢慢走。”表情从紧张变坚定。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, close-up on Doudou's face and upper body. He hugs the bright yellow backpack tight, closes eyes, takes a deep breath, then opens eyes with growing determination. Detailed fur, pink nose, slightly pink cheeks, expressive black eyes. Static camera with subtle push-in, soft rim light through foliage, 85mm portrait lens look.

shots.description: 【数步子前进】镜头看见豆豆的小脚丫轻轻落地，他边走边数：“一、二、三。”步伐慢但稳定，小黄包背带贴合身体。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, close-up low angle tracking on small rabbit feet stepping on forest path. Doudou walks slowly and steadily while counting 'one, two, three'. Yellow backpack straps visible bouncing slightly. Low-angle follow shot, soft ground texture, gentle motion blur, 60fps feel, 35mm lens, natural light.

shots.description: 【小河拦路】豆豆来到小河边停下，望着水面与石头，眉头微皱但不后退，抬手指向对岸像在规划路线。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot at a shallow river with stepping stones. Doudou the young white rabbit stands at the bank, bright yellow backpack, thoughtful expression, pointing toward the other side as if planning. Slow semicircle orbit camera, sparkling water highlights, soft breeze, cinematic composition, 24fps film look.

shots.description: 【找树枝当拐杖】豆豆在河边捡起一根长树枝当拐杖，双手握紧试了试，点点头给自己打气。
shots.cameraMovement: 从树枝到豆豆脸部的缓慢上摇
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, medium shot. Near riverbank, Doudou picks up a long sturdy branch, grips it with both paws like a walking stick, tests it, then nods to encourage himself. Bright yellow backpack, childlike outfit. Camera tilts up slowly from the branch to his face, soft natural light, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field.

shots.description: 【过河】豆豆用树枝撑地，小心踩过石头，一步一步移动；紧张时眼睛睁得更圆，耳朵微微后缩，但仍稳住身体。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot side tracking. Doudou crosses the river on stepping stones, using a long branch as support. Eyes wide with tension, ears slightly back, but posture steady. Yellow backpack stays snug. Water ripples, stones wet and reflective. Smooth lateral tracking, cinematic contrast, 35mm lens, gentle slow motion accents.

shots.description: 【突发：松鼠落水】豆豆刚踏稳一块石头，听到“扑通！”他猛地回头；画面边缘一只小松鼠掉进水里扑腾吱吱叫，豆豆表情一惊但立刻专注。
shots.cameraMovement: 快速摇摄到落水方向后稳定
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot. Doudou stands on a stepping stone mid-river, suddenly hears a splash; camera whip-pans to reveal a small squirrel falling into the water near him, squeaking and paddling. Doudou turns sharply, startled then focused. Stabilize after whip pan, dynamic composition, water splashes frozen crisp, 24fps cinematic, 35mm lens.

shots.description: 【救援】豆豆深吸一口气，把长树枝伸向水里的松鼠，坚定喊：“抓住！”松鼠抓住树枝，豆豆两脚站稳用力往回拉。
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, medium shot. Doudou the young white rabbit braces himself on stones, inhales deeply, extends the long branch toward the struggling squirrel and shouts 'Grab on!'. The squirrel grips the branch; Doudou pulls with determination, eyes focused, ears slightly back. Slow push-in, dramatic but warm lighting, detailed fur and water droplets, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field.

shots.description: 【松鼠上岸致谢】松鼠被拉上岸抖抖尾巴，喘口气对豆豆说：“你真勇敢！”豆豆松一口气微笑，抱着树枝与小黄包站在一旁。
shots.cameraMovement: 轻微平移对位两者表情
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, medium two-shot. On riverbank, the small squirrel climbs out, shakes its tail and thanks Doudou. Doudou smiles with relief, holding the branch, bright yellow backpack visible. Gentle side slide to frame both faces, warm sunlight through leaves, 50mm lens, soft bokeh, calm tone.

shots.description: 【找到彩虹花/歌声与领悟】松鼠在前方引路（可在画面边缘指向），豆豆跟着来到彩虹花前；彩虹花绽放并“啦啦啦”唱起。豆豆眼睛弯弯笑着说：“原来勇敢不是不害怕，是愿意试一试。”
shots.cameraMovement: 从豆豆背影缓慢推到花前定住
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot. Forest clearing with a magical rainbow-colored flower. Doudou (small white rabbit with pink cheeks, upright ears, bright yellow backpack) arrives following the squirrel. The rainbow flower blooms and seems to sing 'la la la' with subtle shimmering pollen. Doudou smiles warmly and speaks his realization. Slow push from behind Doudou to reveal the flower, dreamy soft glow, volumetric light, 35mm lens, high detail.

shots.description: 【回家路上/收进心里】傍晚回家小路上，豆豆一边走一边用双手轻按胸口，像把彩虹花的歌声“装进心里”；远处家门与暖灯光，他开心地朝前走，准备把歌声送给妈妈听。
shots.cameraMovement: 背后跟拍+缓慢拉远收尾
shots.videoPrompt: 4k, cinematic lighting, masterpiece, wide shot back-follow. Sunset forest path leading toward a cozy home with warm lights. Doudou walks happily, gently pressing his chest with both paws as if keeping the song in his heart; bright yellow backpack on his back. Camera follows from behind then slowly pulls back for a closing feel. Golden hour lighting, soft haze, 35mm lens, cinematic ending frame.
